studyName: Birth Defects: Moebius Syndrome and Related Congenital Facial Weakness Disorders

tables.description: Subject ID, family ID, father, mother, sex, and monozygotic twins of participants with Moebius Syndrome and related congenital facial weakness disorders and involved in the "Birth Defects: Moebius Syndrome and Related Congenital Facial Weakness Disorders" project.

variables.name: MZ_TWIN_ID
variables.description: Twin ID for monozygotic twins and multiples. An MZ_TWIN_ID is not provided for dizygotic twins or multiples.

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, tumor status, and array platform used genotyping of participants with Moebius Syndrome and related congenital facial weakness disorders and involved in the "Birth Defects: Moebius Syndrome and Related Congenital Facial Weakness Disorders" project.

variables.name: PLATFORM
variables.description: SNP array platform used to perform SNP genotyping; Capture kit used for short-read pair-end WES; or Sequencing platform used to perform short-read pair-end WGS

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, and gender of participants with Moebius Syndrome and related congenital facial weakness disorders and involved in the "Birth Defects: Moebius Syndrome and Related Congenital Facial Weakness Disorders" project.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

tables.description: Subject ID and sample ID of participants with Moebius Syndrome and related congenital facial weakness disorders and involved in the "Birth Defects: Moebius Syndrome and Related Congenital Facial Weakness Disorders" project.

Subject ID and affection status of participants with Moebius Syndrome and related congenital facial weakness disorders and involved in the "Birth Defects: Moebius Syndrome and Related Congenital Facial Weakness Disorders" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Moebius syndrome or related facial weakness disorder
